import React from 'react'; import './About.css'; // Import your CSS file function About() { return (

About Me

Hello! I’m Shreya, a passionate Web Developer dedicated to crafting seamless and engaging web experiences. With a solid background in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern Front-End frameworks, I thrive on turning complex challenges into intuitive and functional designs. I started my journey by pursuing a Master's degree in Computer Science from New Mexico State University - Main Campus.

Over the years, I’ve had the privilege of working on diverse projects that showcase my ability to blend creativity with technical skill. From interactive user interfaces to responsive layouts, I take pride in delivering high-quality solutions that meet user needs. I thrive on weaving together aesthetics and functionality, crafting solutions that not only meet user needs but also spark delight and curiosity. As a detail-oriented developer, I find joy in solving problems and bringing ideas to life through code. When I’m not immersed in my work, I cherish time with family and friends, which keeps me grounded and fuels my creativity. In the evenings, you’ll often find me in the kitchen, experimenting with spices and flavors to create vibrant, new dishes.

); } export default About;
